calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Off Calendar

Request To Fix Attorneys Fees & Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Daniel Iannitelli, Esq. for the plaintiff University of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's Witness Brian Wollander was placed under oath and testifies.
Default of Defendant Marsella C. Gilbert has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Principal - $7,541.49
Pre-judgment Interest - $1842.89
Attorney fees - $3500.00
Costs - $910.10, Total money judgment $13,794.48
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
